name: Set Material
description: Sets material color/emissive/opacity on mesh objects.
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Set Material

Sets material color/emissive/opacity on mesh objects.

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `color` | Color | `string` | `#ffffff` | - |
| `emissive` | Emissive | `string` | `` | - |
| `opacity` | Opacity | `number` | `1` | - |
| `includeChildren` | Include Children | `boolean` | `true` | - |
